title: Creativity + Innovation
description: Post a MinorWe hear every day about the importance of creativity and innovation (C+I) in our lives, careers, and societies. The C+I minor helps students gain a deeper understanding of their creative and innovative selves and to gain greater confidence in these areas.
text:
Creativity + Innovation
We hear every day about the importance of creativity and innovation (C+I) in our lives, careers, and societies. The C+I minor helps students gain a deeper understanding of their creative and innovative selves and to gain greater confidence in these areas. The minor also equips students with tools that enable them to develop further the work and projects they undertake in their majors. Beyond this, C+I are highly relevant to all students in their future careers.
Requirements for the Minor
Choose one "Create + Consider" course:
PCIX-SHU 101 Creativity ConsideredPCIX-SHU 301 Entrepreneurship ExperiencedIMBX-SHU 212 Generative AI: A Business Revolution
Choose one design thinking course:
PCIX-SHU 103 Life DesignPCIX-SHU 104 Creative Learning DesignPCIX-SHU 201 Design Thinking
Creativity + Innovation Elective Courses:
PCIX-SHU 202 Communicating for Influence
IMBX-SHU 210/PCIX-SHU 210 The Strategist
IMBX-SHU 222 Reinventing the Brand
SOCS-SHU 207 Urban and Architectural Design in China
SOCS-SHU 318 Ethnographic Methods
BUSF-SHU 225 Negotiation and Consensus Building
MKTG-SHU 110 Practicum on Innovation and Branding
PCIX-SHU 102 Experience Studio
IMBX-SHU 100 Topics in IMB
Note: Courses with two different course codes/prefixes will be changing code/prefix to PCIX-SHU XXX in future semesters. Students who take these courses will be eligible to count them toward the C+I minor requirement, regardless of code/prefix. Due to the similarity of the curriculum, IMB major students are not eligible to pursue the C+I minor.
Faculty Mentor
